name: dubhe-eve-builder-template
description: Dubhe EVE builder smart assembly template

scripts.flow:smart-gate: pnpm configure-rules && pnpm authorise-gate-extension && pnpm authorise-storage-unit-extension && pnpm issue-tribe-jump-permit && pnpm jump-with-permit && pnpm collect-corpse-bounty
scripts.fmt:move: sui move fmt --path move-contracts/smart_gate_extension && sui move fmt --path move-contracts/storage_unit_extension
scripts.publish:smart-gate:localnet: cd move-contracts/smart_gate_extension && sui client test-publish --build-env testnet --pubfile-path ../../deployments/localnet/Pub.localnet.toml
scripts.publish:smart-gate:testnet: cd move-contracts/smart_gate_extension && sui client publish -e testnet
